data.risk: Seed data and validator can drift if schema is implicit.
data.mitigation: Define schema first, validate all seeds in CI/local script, document required fields.

data.naming: Use kebab-case source ids such as official-gesp-syllabus and mirror-luogu-gesp-level5.
data.imports: Use dependency-free Node scripts until project stack is chosen.
data.formatting: Keep registry JSON deterministic: stable arrays, explicit trust_level and source_type for each source.

data.framework: node built-in fs/url, no external dependency
